fields.label: Organization Slug
fields.helpText: Your Sentry organization slug from the URL

healthcheck_config.description: Validates auth token via organization endpoint

metadata.summary: Sentry application monitoring for errors, performance, and session replay.
metadata.setup_guide:
1. Go to sentry.io/settings/auth-tokens/
2. Click 'Create New Token'
3. Select the required scopes and click 'Create Token'
4. Copy the sntrys_... token and your organization slug from the URL
5. Paste both values here
